reason: Draft service page includes performance claims that need proof review.
context_summary: The proposed copy says the service cuts onboarding time by 40 percent, but no approved proof source was attached.
requested_action: Review the claim and approve, revise, or remove it before publication.
acceptance_criteria: Every performance claim has an approved proof source.
Unsupported claims are removed or rewritten.
Final copy passes anti-ai-public-writing after compliance edits.
due_trigger: Before the service page moves to publication review.
